claim: The uploaded sector-33 compatibility data rule out raw algebra-quotient compatibility and identify height-coherent action-return intertwining as the correct finite theorem target.
claim_boundary: This locks the theorem target and constraints. It does not compute the missing height/action-return operator matrix.

ladder.content: e33^2=e33 over raw A985 multiplication; 56-entry support remains exactly 56
ladder.meaning: sector 33 is a genuine idempotent sector

ladder.content: 56 -> 33 has rank 33 and kernel 23; core injects and bridge collapses
pi_Foam33 is not a raw algebra homomorphism on the full 56-support relation algebra
ladder.meaning: the bridge is a correction shell, not a two-sided quotient ideal

ladder.content: core-core quotient has no relation-label inconsistencies
ladder.meaning: the obstruction is localized to the anchor/bridge collapse

ladder.content: all 30 directed pair lifts and cycle-8 variants have zero pi33 readout
ladder.meaning: bare boundary loop cannot recover sector 33

ladder.content: cycle8 lift is nonzero and overlaps sector 33 only through signed-balanced bridge support
ladder.meaning: support contact is real, coefficient/character readout is zero

ladder.content: A8 candidate has dim 8, Lambda^3 A8 = 56, hidden generator basis index 6 carries height 903168
ladder.meaning: the missing operator is height/action-return correction

operator_target.boundary: This package formalizes the correct theorem target and input constraints. It does not compute the missing R_hc matrix.
operator_target.interpretation: Foam33 is actor-compatible for height/action-return transport, not a raw algebra quotient.
known_constraints: R_hc must not reduce to bare boundary-to-loop lambda_boundary.
R_hc must see the unique simultaneous mod2/mod3 invisible primitive at basis index 6.
R_hc must convert signed-balanced bridge support into the global-anchor correction without violating e33 idempotency.
R_hc must preserve the Foam core quotient.
operator_target.name: Height-Coherent Action-Return Intertwining Theorem
pass_condition: For every tested action-return generator g, pi_Foam33(R_hc(g,v)) = R_Foam(g,pi_Foam33(v)).
Bridge kernel maps only to the global-anchor correction or zero.
Cycle8/gamma8 produces the expected height-coherent nonzero class, while bare boundary-to-loop remains annihilated.
